snippets.content: CHERENKOV-QA: API conformance test generator. OpenAPI spec in, Playwright tests out, zero lock-in. SSOT = docs/. Active phase: Phase 8 (K8s). Tracks: A(complete), B(complete), C(blocked), D(blocked), E(complete), F(in progress). Invariants: D7(no auto-edit), anti-lock-in, suggest-only healing, spec-derived HTTP status.

Agent memory at agent_memory/: endpoints.md, known-bugs.md, test-patterns.md, dashboard-states.md, snyk-findings.md, validation-gate.md. Sync runtime at agent_memory/sync/: session.json, tokens.json, context.json, experience.json, findings/.

Phase 8 (K8s+Cloud+Gate): #386-#388 (CRD sync + device env vars — code done, needs make k3d-test), #389 (SECURITY.md added), #390 (gate — resolved), #391 (docs — SYSTEM_DESIGN.md + BEST_PRACTICES.md updated). Phase 3 blocked: needs cargo. Phase 5-6 blocked: needs ADB/Maestro.
ANTI-DRIFT: docs/ is the SSOT. There is NO v3.1+delta. Show raw evidence for every claim. No fabricated test matrices.
INVARIANT D7: Never auto-edit test code. Healing = suggest-only. Validate = report-only. Zero files modified on disk.
ANTI-LOCK-IN: Eject strips all cherenkov imports. Output must run as standalone Playwright with zero cherenkov path references.
SPEC-DERIVED: Expected HTTP status comes from OpenAPI spec, never hardcoded. 422 vs 400 is the canonical bug this project catches.
CANONICAL BUG: POST /users returns 400 (implementation) but spec declares 422. Tests assert 422 per spec — they go RED against live target. This is the core demo scenario.

Skills in skills/: api-test-generation, eject-standalone, governance-certification, hitl-review, jira-exporter, k6-perf, mcp-integration, mena-compliance, perf-baseline, rag-query, self-healing, snyk-remediation, visual-diff, visual-regression, sync-driven-dev.
New modules follow: cherenkov/{module}/domain/ + ports/ + adapters/ + use_cases/ + api/. See ADR-004. Dependency flow downward only.
Go 1.22.5 available at ~/.local/opt/go/bin/go. K3d v5.6.3 at ~/.local/bin/k3d. Docker, kubectl, curl, wget all available in WSL Ubuntu-24.04 environment.
